title: Loops
description: Learn to repeat operations in C++ using for, while, do-while, and range-based loops in high-frequency game ticks.
learningObjectives: Use for loops, while loops, and do-while loops
Implement modern C++ range-based for loops to iterate over collections
Identify and prevent game-freezing infinite loops on the main thread

sections.title: Iterative Structures in Game Loops
sections.content: Iteration mechanisms execute code blocks repeatedly until conditions are met. In games, loops iterate through active particle collections, active projectiles, or characters. Range-based for loops (C++11) are preferred for collections because they compile to safe and optimized pointer operations, eliminating manual bounds indexing mistakes.

sections.title: Updating Projectiles using Range-Based Loops
